title: cochranea glutinosa
intro: Cochranea glutinosa, also known as the sticky bush, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Thymelaeaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cochranea glutinosa include its ability to soothe and heal skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Cochranea glutinosa can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which are often used topically to treat various skin conditions.
